label: Registry Stores
description: Registry Stores forms the secured storage chamber behind The Writbound Ledger’s copy-floor, built into the city’s older stonework and faced with later blackened brick. Riveted iron shelving carries sealed charter-tubes, bundled folios, and waxed packets, each tagged with standardized oath-hall forms and license tabs. The air remains dry from lime-plaster and soot-darkened vents, and the floor is scored with haul-marks from contract chests moved to and from the fireproof alcove. A narrow wall section is set with iron rings and padlock staples for quarantine-held parcels under posted interdiction excerpts.
